paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 121 — we need to reverse this today. Well below the 7-day average of 128 — the team is making real progress. 17 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 17. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $29,795 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 41 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **34 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $39,800 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 31 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 15. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **42 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $27,753 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 43 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 10 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 10. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **52 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,760 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **52 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,647 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 7. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue for multiple days running — no progress. This needs a direct conversation with the PM. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $26,453 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 34 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 32 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 21 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

358 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **314 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 48 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$142,427 in payments going out this week** across 72 tasks — make sure funds are available. $39,955 expected in from 5 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 21. This needs to turn around today.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 10 overdue — oldest first. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 8 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **52 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 63 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue stuck for days — needs direct action, not just monitoring. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 32. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 17 overdue (oldest: 41d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **34 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
